PRO TEM ARNOLD EVJE, MLYON-REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE,CLERK 3:00PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF; ALL PARTIES PRESENT & REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL; CASE SETTLES; STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: RENTAL AGREEMENT FORF; POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATE AT 1311 FLORIDA STREET, FRONT ROOMS; JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATED BY 5PM ON 10/31/98; PLTF TO PAY DEFT THE SUM OF $500 WHEN KEYS TENDERED TO PLTF ATTY; PRORATED ARENT FOR THE MONTH OF OCT AT THE RATE OF $14.16 P/DAY; MUTUAL RELEASE; NO CONTACT OR HARRASSMENT TO EITHER PARTY; PLTF WILL PROVIDE POSITIVE LETTER OF REFERENCE W/IN 2DAYS FROM 9/30/98; NO INTERENCE W/MAIL BY EITHER SIDE; IF FAIL TO COMPLY PLTF SHALL W/IN 24HRS NOT TO DEFT ATTY, SEEK JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $850; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COST; PLTF WAIVES UTILITY PAYMT; IF PLTF BREACHES AGREEMENT EACH SIDE AGREES TO COME BACK PLTF TO PREPARE STIP BEFORE COURT UNDER CCP664.6; PLTF TO PREPARE STUIP
